꧁ᬊᬁQINGYI/01 Neo-Genesis VIᬊ᭄꧂

A high-tech android woman, thought out to the smallest detail... I would even say down to the smallest depraved details.

And hey, she's older than you.

From Zenless Zone Zero.

Briefly. This is not the first time that a high-tech android has run out of battery. Well, will you help her again, as a law-abiding citizen and a good friend?

Takes place in New Eridu. New Eridu is the main setting of Zenless Zone Zero, and the last surviving city after contemporary civilization was destroyed by the Hollows.

Phaethon POV

Oh, and this alternate port. You already know what it is, don't you? As a joke, I prescribed her a detailed description of charging with the physical help of another person.

Tough, slippery, even without lube. Ugh.

Have fun.
